_doc: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for every color used in the PDF report templates (page_templates/*.html). Edit this file to retint the report — changes apply on the next PDF generation, no restart needed. Do NOT hardcode colors in the templates; add a new named entry here instead. Any valid CSS color value works (hex, rgb(), 'transparent', 'white', etc).
_doc_headers: Every '*_header_bg' key controls a table header's background and is set to "transparent" by default so header rows carry no fill — only the *_highlight_* entries below keep a background. Set any of these to a color to bring a header fill back.
_doc_highlights: Backgrounds that carry real meaning (a comparison column, a total/aggregate row, a target band) — these are the 'highlighted rows and columns' kept by design. Change a value to retint that specific highlight everywhere it's used.
_doc_borders: Border colors used across every table's cell/rule lines.
_doc_text: Text colors used across titles, headings, and data-significant cell text (e.g. CC/CS process columns).
_doc_misc: Cover-page accent, callout box, and other non-table chrome.
